31: 
32:     public ReleaseBundleDeleteExecutor(DistributionServer server, String name, String version, boolean dryRun, boolean sync,
33:                                        boolean deleteFromDist, String distRules, List<String> countryCodes, String siteName,
34:                                        String cityName, TaskListener listener, Run<?, ?> build, FilePath ws) throws IOException {
35:         this.distributionManagerBuilder = server.createDistributionManagerBuilder(new JenkinsBuildInfoLog(listener), build.getParent());
36:         this.request = createRequest(distRules, countryCodes, siteName, cityName, dryRun, deleteFromDist);

48:                                                      String cityName, boolean dryRun, boolean deleteFromDist) throws IOException {

50:         if (StringUtils.isNotBlank(distRules)) {
51:             if (!CollectionUtils.isEmpty(countryCodes) || !StringUtils.isAllBlank(siteName, cityName)) {
52:                 throw new IOException("The distRules input can't be used with site, city or country codes");
53:             }

55:             request = mapper.readValue(distRules, DeleteReleaseBundleRequest.class);
56:         } else {
57:             request = new DeleteReleaseBundleRequest();
58:             request.setDistributionRules(Utils.createDistributionRules(countryCodes, siteName, cityName));
59:         }
60:         request.setDryRun(dryRun);
61:         request.setOnSuccess(deleteFromDist ?
62:                 DeleteReleaseBundleRequest.OnSuccess.delete : DeleteReleaseBundleRequest.OnSuccess.keep);
63:         return request;

57:      * We don't use additional context fields in this step execution,
58:      * so we extend SynchronousStepExecution directly and not ArtifactorySynchronousStepExecution
59:      */
60:     public static class Execution extends SynchronousStepExecution<JFrogPlatformInstance> {
61:         private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;

74:                 throw new IllegalArgumentException("At least one of the following is mandatory: 'url', 'artifactoryUrl', 'distributionUrl'");

87:                 distributionServer = new DistributionServer(distributionUrl, step.username, step.password);

38:         deployer.setServer(server);
39:         deployer.setRepo(sourceRepo);
40:         FilePath tempDir = ExtractorUtils.createAndGetTempDir(ws);
41:         EnvExtractor envExtractor = new CreateDockerBuildEnvExtractor(build, buildInfo, deployer, listener, launcher, tempDir, env, kanikoImageFile, jibImageFile);
42:         super.execute("Create Docker Build", "org.jfrog.build.extractor.docker.extractor.BuildDockerCreator", envExtractor, tempDir);
43:     }
44: 
45:     public BuildInfo getBuildInfo() {
46:         return buildInfo;
47:     }
48: }

<path>/workspace/artifactory-plugin/src/main/java/org/jfrog/hudson/release/scm/perforce/P4Manager.java</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: package org.jfrog.hudson.release.scm.perforce;
2: 
3: import com.perforce.p4java.client.IClient;
4: import com.perforce.p4java.server.IOptionsServer;
5: import hudson.EnvVars;
6: import hudson.model.AbstractBuild;
7: import hudson.model.TaskListener;
8: import org.apache.commons.lang3.StringUtils;
9: import org.jenkinsci.plugins.p4.PerforceScm;
10: import org.jenkinsci.plugins.p4.client.ClientHelper;
11: import org.jenkinsci.plugins.p4.client.ConnectionFactory;
12: import org.jenkinsci.plugins.p4.client.ConnectionHelper;
13: import org.jfrog.build.vcs.perforce.PerforceClient;
14: import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
15: import java.util.logging.Level;
16: import java.util.logging.Logger;
17: 
18: /**
19:  * Interacts with Perforce various release operations.
20:  * Using the updated perforce plugin - P4.
21:  *
22:  * @author Aviad Shikloshi
23:  */
24: public class P4Manager extends AbstractPerforceManager<PerforceScm> {
25: 
26:     private static final Logger logger = Logger.getLogger(P4Manager.class.getName());
27: 
28:     public P4Manager(AbstractBuild<?, ?> build, TaskListener buildListener) {
29:         super(build, buildListener);
30:     }
31: 
32:     @Override
33:     public void prepare() {
34:         PerforceScm perforceScm = getJenkinsScm();
35:         String credentials = perforceScm.getCredential();
36:         ConnectionHelper connection = new ConnectionHelper(credentials, buildListener);
37:         IOptionsServer server = ConnectionFactory.getConnection();
38:         try {
39:             String clientString = getClientString();
40:             if (connection.isClient(clientString)) {
41:                 ClientHelper perforceClient = new ClientHelper(build.getParent(), buildListener, clientString, StandardCharsets.UTF_8.toString());
42:                 IClient client = perforceClient.getClient();
43:                 try {
44:                     this.perforce = new PerforceClient(server, client);
45:                     this.perforce.initConnection();
46:                 } catch (Exception e) {
47:                     logger.warning("Could not instantiate connection with PerforceClient: " + e.getMessage());
48:                 }
49:             } else {
50:                 logger.warning("Client " + clientString + " is not a valid client.");
51:             }
52:         } catch (Exception e) {
53:             logger.log(Level.FINE, "Error occurred: ", e);
54:         }
55:     }
56: 
57:     @Override
58:     public PerforceClient establishConnection() throws Exception {
59:         this.perforce.initConnection();
60:         return this.perforce;
61:     }
62: 
63:     private String getClientString() {
64:         String client = StringUtils.EMPTY;
65:         try {
66:             EnvVars envVars = build.getEnvironment(buildListener);
67:             client = envVars.get("P4_CLIENT");
68:         } catch (Exception e) {
69:             logger.log(Level.FINE, "P4: Unable to read P4_CLIENT");
70:         }
71:         return client;
72:     }
73: }

(End of file - total 73 lines)
